description_long: This is a modern, single-story Burger King fast food restaurant with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The exterior features a combination of dark gray and black wall panels, accented by a red trim running along the roofline. Large windows line the front and one side of the building, providing visibility into the dining area, while the main entrance is set within a black-framed vestibule. The Burger King logo is prominently displayed on the front facade above the entrance, and the building sits on a paved sidewalk with a small green strip at the rear. There are no visible drive-thru windows or outdoor seating areas, and the overall design is clean and functional, typical of contemporary fast food architecture.
description: A modern Burger King restaurant with dark gray and black walls, red roof trim, large front windows, and a prominent logo above the entrance.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the Burger King logo above the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of windows and the main entrance set in a black-framed vestibule.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, a single door, and a small green strip along the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and architectural features, but no signage or entrance.
attribute_signage: Wall-mounted, circular Burger King sign above the main entrance, featuring the brand's name and colors. The sign is medium-sized, centered, and visually prominent.
attribute_logo: A circular Burger King logo is visible above the main entrance, featuring red, yellow, and blue colors with the brand name in the center.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary fast food architecture with a flat roof, clean lines, dark color palette, large windows, and minimal ornamentation. The design emphasizes functionality and brand visibility.
